nodes.description: A conversational AI agent built to interact with users in multiple languages, especially code-switched dialects, to perform banking tasks.
A linguistic profile of the NepGlish speech pattern, where speakers transition smoothly between Nepali and English in conversational flows.
Natural Language Processing algorithms customized to handle syntax, vocabularies, and intents across code-switched or mixed languages.
A specialized speech-to-text pipeline trained on multilingual and code-switched audio datasets to transcribe user queries accurately.
Biometric system extracting acoustic features from a speaker's voice to create a unique signature, ensuring secure access and authentication.
Classification models that detect desired user actions (like blocking a card) and extract entities (card details) from code-switched commands.
